fields.label: Store Name
fields.description: A friendly label for this store, e.g. 'Main Store'. Used in sync logs and reports.

fields.label: WooCommerce URL
fields.description: Full WooCommerce store URL including https://, e.g. https://mystore.com. Do not include /wp-admin.

fields.label: Is Active
fields.description: Uncheck to pause all sync for this store without deleting its configuration.

fields.label: Connection Status
fields.description: Last known connection status. Updated automatically when you test the connection.

fields.label: Last Connection Check
fields.description: When ERPNext last successfully communicated with this WooCommerce store.

fields.label: Consumer Key
fields.description: WooCommerce REST API Consumer Key. Generate in WooCommerce > Settings > Advanced > REST API. Set permission to Read/Write.

fields.label: Consumer Secret
fields.description: WooCommerce REST API Consumer Secret. Generated alongside Consumer Key. Stored encrypted in ERPNext.

fields.label: Webhook Secret
fields.description: Secret used to verify incoming WooCommerce webhook signatures (HMAC-SHA256). Generate a strong random string and paste it here and in your WooCommerce webhook settings.

fields.label: WooCommerce API Version
fields.description: WooCommerce REST API version. Leave as wc/v3 unless instructed otherwise by support.

fields.label: Company
fields.description: WooCommerce orders are created under this company in ERPNext. Required.

fields.label: Warehouse
fields.description: Stock levels pushed to WooCommerce come from this warehouse. Delivery orders for WooCommerce sales also use this warehouse.

fields.label: Income Account
fields.description: Which account records WooCommerce sales revenue. Usually your main Sales account in your chart of accounts.

fields.label: Tax Account
fields.description: Which account records taxes collected from WooCommerce. Usually 'Sales Tax Payable' or 'Output VAT'.

fields.label: Item Group
fields.description: New products imported from WooCommerce are placed in this item group. You can move them to other groups later.

fields.label: Customer Group
fields.description: WooCommerce customers are assigned to this customer group in ERPNext. Useful for segmenting ecommerce vs direct sales.

fields.label: Default UOM
fields.description: Unit of measure for imported products. Usually 'Nos' (Numbers). Individual items can use different UOMs later.

fields.label: SO Naming Series
fields.description: Naming series for Sales Orders created from WooCommerce orders. Helps identify WooCommerce orders in ERPNext reports.

fields.label: Sync Direction
fields.options:
Both Ways
WooCommerce to ERPNext
ERPNext to WooCommerce
fields.description: Both Ways: keeps everything in sync. WooCommerce to ERPNext: WooCommerce is master. ERPNext to WooCommerce: ERPNext is master.

fields.label: API Rate Limit (per minute)
fields.description: Maximum WooCommerce API requests per minute. 60 is safe for most stores. Raise to 120 on dedicated servers.

fields.label: Webhook URL
fields.description: Register this URL in WooCommerce > Settings > Advanced > Webhooks. ERPNext automatically fills this based on your site URL.
